columns.name: dem_sap
columns.label: SAP/NHC
columns.description: SAP code associated with the patient.

columns.name: surg_date
columns.label: Date of surgery
columns.description: Records the exact date when any surgical intervention on the primary solid tumor was performed.

columns.name: surg_procedure_type
columns.label: Procedure type
columns.description: Binary categorical field distinguishing between diagnostic stereotactic biopsy versus therapeutic surgical excision/resection of primary brain tumors.

columns.name: surg_hospital
columns.label: Surgery Hospital name
columns.description: Free-text field capturing the exact name of the hospital or surgical center where primary tumor surgery occurred.

columns.name: surg_biopsy_id
columns.label: Surgery Biopsy ID
columns.description: Unique identifier assigned to the pathology specimen obtained during primary tumor surgery (from surgical pathology report).

columns.name: surg_location
columns.label: Surgery location
columns.description: Multi-select checkbox field specifying all anatomical sites surgically intervened during primary tumor resection.

columns.name: surg_location_other
columns.label: Other surgery location
columns.description: Free-text field to document anatomical sites surgically intervened not covered by standard checkbox options.

columns.name: surg_post_status
columns.label: Post-surgical disease status
columns.description: Binary assessment from surgical pathology report and/or post-operative imaging documenting complete resection (R0/no residual tumor) versus incomplete resection (R1/R2/residual tumor present) following primary tumor surgery.

columns.name: surg_exploratory_laparotomy
columns.label: Exploratory laparatomy performed?
columns.description: Binary indicator documenting whether an exploratory laparotomy (open abdominal surgery for intra-abdominal inspection, biopsy, or staging) was performed as part of primary tumor assessment or diagnostic workup across abdominal/pelvic solid tumors.

columns.name: surg_invasion
columns.label: Invasion
columns.description: Multi-select checkbox field documenting specific microvascular invasion patterns identified in the surgical pathology specimen (lymphatic, perineural, venous).

columns.name: surg_tumor_budding
columns.label: Tumor budding
columns.description: Single-select radio button field documenting tumor budding grade at the invasive front per ITBCC 2016 consensus guidelines from surgical pathology report, using refined 4-tier system (Bd0-Bd3) for colorectal and other epithelial cancers.

columns.name: surg_pt
columns.label: pT category
columns.description: Single-select documenting pathological primary tumor category (pT) from surgical pathology report, quantifying extent of primary tumor invasion through basement membrane into surrounding tissues.

columns.name: surg_pn
columns.label: pN category
columns.description: Single-select documenting pathological regional lymph node category (pN) from surgical pathology report, quantifying number and morphology of metastatic lymph nodes examined.

columns.name: surg_pm
columns.label: pM category
columns.description: Single-select documenting pathological distant metastasis category (pM) from surgical pathology report, confirming histologically verified distant metastatic deposits identified during primary tumor resection.

columns.name: surg_tnm_stage
columns.label: TNM stage at diagnosis
columns.description: Single-select specifying the complete pathological TNM stage group determined from surgical pathology report.

columns.name: surg_regression_grade
columns.label: Regression grade (GR)
columns.description: Single-select categorical field documenting tumor regression grade in surgical pathology specimen following neoadjuvant treatment.

columns.name: surg_resection_grade
columns.label: Resection
columns.description: Single-select categorical field documenting surgical margin status from surgical pathology report, classifying completeness of primary tumor resection (R0 microscopic clearance vs R1/R2 residual disease).

columns.name: surg_pcr
columns.label: pCR achived?
columns.description: Binary indicator confirming pathological complete response (pCR = ypT0/Tis ypN0) in surgical pathology specimen following neoadjuvant chemotherapy ± radiotherapy.

columns.name: surg_type
columns.label: Surgery type
columns.description: Single-select radio button field specifying the exact surgical procedure performed on the primary tumor.

columns.name: surg_type_other
columns.label: Other surgery type
columns.description: Free-text field to document surgical procedures not covered by standardized radio button options.

columns.name: ttm_crs
columns.label: CRS
columns.description: Single-select radio button field documenting Chemotherapy Response Score (CRS) in omental/ovarian specimens from interval debulking surgery following neoadjuvant chemotherapy.

columns.name: surg_gc
columns.label: Result of GC after surgery
columns.description: Binary indicator documenting Sentinel Lymph Node Biopsy (SLNB) pathological result after primary tumor surgery.

columns.name: surg_rcb
columns.label: RCB
columns.description: Single-select categorical field documenting Residual Cancer Burden (RCB) index class (0-III) in breast cancer surgical pathology specimen following neoadjuvant chemotherapy.

columns.name: surg_adp
columns.label: ADP  (number of nodes identified)
columns.description: Integer field documenting the total number of axillary lymph nodes pathologically examined and identified in the surgical pathology specimen.

columns.name: surg_adp_invaded
columns.label: Invaded ADP (number of invaded nodes)
columns.description: Integer field quantifying the exact number of axillary lymph nodes pathologically confirmed as metastatic.
